no-restricted-globals.name: Map
no-restricted-globals.message: Map pulls in ~400 lines of TSTL runtime, use a plain object instead

no-restricted-globals.name: Set
no-restricted-globals.message: Set pulls in ~400 lines of TSTL runtime, use a plain object instead

no-restricted-globals.name: WeakMap
no-restricted-globals.message: WeakMap is not supported in SLua

no-restricted-globals.name: WeakSet
no-restricted-globals.message: WeakSet is not supported in SLua

no-restricted-globals.name: fetch
no-restricted-globals.message: fetch is not available in SLua, use ll.HTTPRequest()

no-restricted-globals.name: document
no-restricted-globals.message: DOM APIs are not available in SLua

no-restricted-globals.name: window
no-restricted-globals.message: Browser APIs are not available in SLua

no-restricted-globals.name: XMLHttpRequest
no-restricted-globals.message: XMLHttpRequest is not available in SLua, use ll.HTTPRequest()

no-restricted-globals.name: setTimeout
no-restricted-globals.message: setTimeout is not available in SLua, use LLTimers:setTimer()

no-restricted-globals.name: setInterval
no-restricted-globals.message: setInterval is not available in SLua, use LLTimers:setTimer()

no-restricted-globals.name: clearTimeout
no-restricted-globals.message: clearTimeout is not available in SLua

no-restricted-globals.name: clearInterval
no-restricted-globals.message: clearInterval is not available in SLua

no-restricted-globals.name: require
no-restricted-globals.message: require is not available in SLua, use ES module imports

no-restricted-globals.name: process
no-restricted-globals.message: Node.js APIs are not available in SLua

no-restricted-globals.name: Buffer
no-restricted-globals.message: Node.js APIs are not available in SLua

no-restricted-globals.name: __dirname
no-restricted-globals.message: Node.js APIs are not available in SLua

no-restricted-globals.name: __filename
no-restricted-globals.message: Node.js APIs are not available in SLua

eslint-js/no-restricted-syntax.message: Assign undefined instead, delete pulls in ~150 lines of TSTL runtime
Rebuild with filter instead, .splice() pulls in ~75 lines of runtime
Reassign to a new array instead
Generators are not supported in SLua
Generators are not supported in SLua
